channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Out of Control': Frontline Ebola Doctors Speak Out
item.description: Doctors at the epicenter of the Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo told ABC News the virus continues to spread at an alarming rate.

item.title: Major blaze and suspected explosion level Dallas apartment building
item.description: At least one individual was taken to the hospital, according to Dallas Fire-Rescue.

item.title: UK estimates nearly 500,000 Russian troops killed in Ukraine war
item.description: This represents the highest official estimate of Russian military fatalities from any government since the conflict began.

item.title: Inflation reaches near three-year high, according to Fed's preferred measure
item.description: Inflation rose for a second straight month, driven by higher gas prices amid the Iran conflict.
